ratings.comment: Professor Asen's lectures are quite dry at times, but the content is important to know for tests and essays. He genuinely cares about the content and his students. However, they do take attendance at lecture which I found to be quite annoying at times. I would take a course taught by Professor Asen again!

Is a good professor, but sometimes he's a little fast with lectures and doesn't record so some of his important comments on the lecture slides can be hard to get. Overall if you just go to lectures and discussions you'll be fine.
